mapper.select:
select HOUR(upload_time) upload_time , FLOOR(sum(traffic_flow)) traffic_flow, MAX(traffic_flow) max_traffic_flow, MIN(traffic_flow) min_traffic_flow, avg(traffic_flow) avgTrafficFlow ,
select a.upload_time, a.max_speed, a.min_speed, cast( a.avg_speed AS SIGNED) avg_speed, a.devicelist_id, SUM(b.hourSumTraffic) traffic_flow, MAX(b.hourSumTraffic) max_traffic_flow, MIN(b.hourSumTraffic) min_traffic_flow , FLOOR(AVG(b.hourSumTraffic)) avgTrafficFlow from ( select date(upload_time) upload_time,
devicelist_id, MAX( max_value ) AS max_speed, MIN( min_value ) AS min_speed, IFNULL(FORMAT((SUM(COALESCE(speed1, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed2, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed3, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed4, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed5, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed6, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed7, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed8, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed9, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed10, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed11, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed12, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed13, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed14, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed15, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed16, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed17, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed18, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed19, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed20, 0))) /
(count(speed1) + count(speed2) + count(speed3) + count(speed4) + count(speed5) + count(speed6) + count(speed7) + count(speed8) + count(speed9) + count(speed10)+ count(speed11)+ count(speed12)+ count(speed13)+ count(speed14)+ count(speed15)+ count(speed16)+ count(speed17)+ count(speed18)+ count(speed19)+ count(speed20)) ,0) ,0) as avg_speed FROM ( SELECT traffic_flow,upload_time,devicelist_id, GREATEST(abs(speed1),abs(speed2),abs(speed3) ,abs(speed4),abs(speed5),abs(speed6),abs(speed7),abs(speed8),abs(speed9),abs(speed10),abs(speed11),abs(speed12),abs(speed13),abs(speed14) ,abs(speed15),abs(speed16),abs(speed17),abs(speed18),abs(speed19),abs(speed20)) AS max_value, LEAST(IF(abs(speed1) != 0,abs(speed1),999),if(abs(speed2),abs(speed2),999),if(abs(speed3),abs(speed3),999) ,if(abs(speed4),abs(speed4),999),if(abs(speed5),abs(speed5),999),if(abs(speed6),abs(speed6),999),if(abs(speed7),abs(speed7),999),if(abs(speed8),abs(speed8),999),if(abs(speed9),abs(speed9),999),if(abs(speed10),abs(speed10),999),if(abs(speed11),abs(speed11),999),if(abs(speed12),abs(speed12),999),if(abs(speed13),abs(speed13),999),if(abs(speed14),abs(speed14),999) ,if(abs(speed15),abs(speed15),999),if(abs(speed16),abs(speed16),999),if(abs(speed17),abs(speed17),999),if(abs(speed18),abs(speed18),999),if(abs(speed19),abs(speed19),999),if(abs(speed20),abs(speed20),999)) AS min_value, CASE WHEN speed1 != 0 THEN speed1 else null end as speed1 , CASE WHEN speed2 != 0 THEN speed2 else null end as speed2 , CASE WHEN speed3 != 0 THEN speed3 else null end as speed3, CASE WHEN speed4 != 0 THEN speed4 else null end as speed4, CASE WHEN speed5 != 0 THEN speed5 else null end as speed5, CASE WHEN speed6 != 0 THEN speed6 else null end as speed6, CASE WHEN speed7 != 0 THEN speed7 else null end as speed7, CASE WHEN speed8 != 0 THEN speed8 else null end as speed8, CASE WHEN speed9 != 0 THEN speed9 else null end as speed9, CASE WHEN speed10 != 0 THEN speed10 else null end as speed10, CASE WHEN speed11 != 0 THEN speed11 else null end as speed11, CASE WHEN speed12 != 0 THEN speed12 else null end as speed12, CASE WHEN speed13 != 0 THEN speed13 else null end as speed13, CASE WHEN speed14 != 0 THEN speed14 else null end as speed14, CASE WHEN speed15 != 0 THEN speed15 else null end as speed15, CASE WHEN speed16 != 0 THEN speed16 else null end as speed16, CASE WHEN speed17 != 0 THEN speed17 else null end as speed17, CASE WHEN speed18 != 0 THEN speed18 else null end as speed18, CASE WHEN speed19 != 0 THEN speed19 else null end as speed19, CASE WHEN speed20 != 0 THEN speed20 else null end as speed20 FROM tunnel_edge_compute_data
AND upload_time >= #{startTime}
AND upload_time <= concat(#{endTime},' 23:59:59')
AND upload_time >= concat(#{time},' 00:00:00') AND upload_time <= concat(#{time},' 23:59:59')
and devicelist_id = #{deviceListId}
and edge_compute_status0 = 0
) AS subquery
GROUP BY HOUR(upload_time) ORDER BY upload_time DESC
GROUP BY date(upload_time), devicelist_id ORDER BY date(upload_time) DESC) a, (SELECT
date(upload_time) upload_day, HOUR(upload_time) AS upload_hour, MAX(traffic_flow) as traffic_flow, FLOOR(SUM(traffic_flow)) hourSumTraffic FROM tunnel_edge_compute_data
AND upload_time >= #{startTime}
AND upload_time <= concat(#{endTime},' 23:59:59')
AND upload_time >= concat(#{time},' 00:00:00') AND upload_time <= concat(#{time},' 23:59:59')
and devicelist_id = #{deviceListId}
and edge_compute_status0 = 0 GROUP BY upload_day,upload_hour ORDER BY upload_hour) b where a.upload_time = b.upload_day GROUP BY a.upload_time, a.max_speed, a.min_speed, a.avg_speed, a.devicelist_id, b.upload_day

SELECT concat( date_format( upload_time, '%H:' ), floor( date_format( upload_time, '%i' ) / 5 ) * 5 ) AS hour, IFNULL(FORMAT((SUM(COALESCE(speed1, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed2, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed3, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed4, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed5, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed6, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed7, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed8, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed9, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(speed10, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed11, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed12, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed13, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed14, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed15, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed16, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed17, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed18, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed19, 0))+ SUM(COALESCE(speed20, 0))) / (count(speed1) + count(speed2) + count(speed3) + count(speed4) + count(speed5) + count(speed6) + count(speed7) + count(speed8) + count(speed9) + count(speed10)+ count(speed11)+ count(speed12)+ count(speed13)+ count(speed14)+ count(speed15)+ count(speed16)+ count(speed17)+ count(speed18)+ count(speed19)+ count(speed20)) ,0) ,0) as avg_speed FROM ( select upload_time, CASE WHEN speed1 != 0 AND speed1 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed1) ELSE null END AS speed1, CASE WHEN speed2 != 0 AND speed2 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed2) ELSE null END AS speed2, CASE WHEN speed3 != 0 AND speed3 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed3) ELSE null END AS speed3, CASE WHEN speed4 != 0 AND speed4 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed4) ELSE null END AS speed4, CASE WHEN speed5 != 0 AND speed5 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed5) ELSE null END AS speed5, CASE WHEN speed6 != 0 AND speed6 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed6) ELSE null END AS speed6, CASE WHEN speed7 != 0 AND speed7 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed7) ELSE null END AS speed7, CASE WHEN speed8 != 0 AND speed8 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed8) ELSE null END AS speed8, CASE WHEN speed9 != 0 AND speed9 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed9) ELSE null END AS speed9, CASE WHEN speed10 != 0 AND speed10 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed10) ELSE null END AS speed10, CASE WHEN speed11 != 0 AND speed11 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed11) ELSE null END AS speed11, CASE WHEN speed12 != 0 AND speed12 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed12) ELSE null END AS speed12, CASE WHEN speed13 != 0 AND speed13 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed13) ELSE null END AS speed13, CASE WHEN speed14 != 0 AND speed14 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed14) ELSE null END AS speed14, CASE WHEN speed15 != 0 AND speed15 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed15) ELSE null END AS speed15, CASE WHEN speed16 != 0 AND speed16 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed16) ELSE null END AS speed16, CASE WHEN speed17 != 0 AND speed17 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed17) ELSE null END AS speed17, CASE WHEN speed18 != 0 AND speed18 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed18) ELSE null END AS speed18, CASE WHEN speed19 != 0 AND speed19 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed19) ELSE null END AS speed19, CASE WHEN speed20 != 0 AND speed20 <= #{entrySpeedLimit} THEN ABS(speed20) ELSE null END AS speed20 FROM tunnel_edge_compute_data WHERE upload_time >= concat(#{time},' 00:00:00') AND upload_time <= concat(#{time},' 23:59:59') AND devicelist_id = #{deviceListId} ) a GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour;
